name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-59
title: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py cites stale rabbit-feature Inv 35
description: Wave 1 (rabbit-feature audit, 2026-05-23) renumbered rabbit-feature invariants. The read-comprehend-Write invariant for spec edits moved from Inv 35 to Inv 29. .claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/dispatch-tdd-subagent.py line 471 still says 'Inv 35 in rabbit-feature codifies this for spec files; the ...'. The citation no longer resolves to the cited content. Update to cite rabbit-feature Inv 29 (or replace the numeric citation with a named reference more resistant to renumbers). This will be naturally addressed during the Wave 3 tdd-subagent audit; filing here so it is not lost.

history.note: Wave 3 audit removed the stale 'rabbit-feature Inv 35' citation from dispatch-tdd-subagent.py; the read-before-edit warning now cites tdd-subagent's own Inv 18 instead of an upstream invariant number.
